attempts.test_code:
from source import process_batch

def test_process_batch_does_not_skip_last_element():
    items = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
    result = process_batch(items)
    expected = [2, 4, 6, 8, 10]
    assert len(result) == len(items), (
        f"Expected {len(items)} items but got {len(result)}. "
        f"The bug causes the last element ({items[-1]}) to be skipped."
    )
    assert result == expected, (
        f"Expected {expected} but got {result}. "
        f"The last element was not processed."
    )
